title: Request Preview
errorDesc: Unable to fetch request preview, please try again
notImplementedDesc: This provider has not implemented request preview yet
mayNotMatch: Note: This preview is reconstructed from current conversation settings and may not exactly match the actual request parameters
emptyDesc: No request trace or view manifest is available for this message
requestUnavailableDesc: This message has no persisted provider request trace
manifestUnavailableDesc: This message has no persisted Tape view manifest

integrity.label: Integrity
integrity.invalidWarning: This view manifest does not match its hash; do not treat the replayed prompt as authentic.
integrity.unverifiedNote: This manifest uses the legacy hash formula (hashVersion 1); its integrity cannot be verified.
